text.title: Project Closure Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Normal closure with operations handover
example.note: Deliverables D1-D7 signed by accepting authority. Lessons learned session held in week 12 with 6 named contributors. Infrastructure staged read-only for 30 days. Final report dispatched to sponsor; closure_checklist.yaml shows 24/24 items green with evidence URLs.
